ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the site is located */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code where the site is located */,
  "site_num" INTEGER /* Site number of the monitoring station */,
  "parameter_code" INTEGER /* Parameter code for the pollutant measured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant parameter */,
  "sample_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the sampling event */,
  "pollutant_standard" TEXT /* Standard for the pollutant measurement */,
  "metric_used" TEXT /* Metric used for the measurement */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., No Events) */,
  "observation_count" INTEGER /* Count of observations collected */,
  "arithmetic_mean" REAL /* Calculated arithmetic mean of the measurements */,
  "arithmetic_standard_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurements */,
  "certification_indicator" TEXT /* Certification status of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the measurement */,
  "pollutant_concentration" REAL /* Actual concentration of the pollutant */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Meteorological conditions at the time of measurement */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who collected the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "qaqc_status" TEXT /* Status of quality assurance and quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_site_num FOREIGN KEY ("site_num") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_method_name FOREIGN KEY ("method_name") REFERENCES methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_parameter_code FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_code") REFERENCES pollutants ("parameter_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_num" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to each monitoring site */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code of the monitoring site */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code of the monitoring site */,
  "local_site_name" TEXT /* Local name of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the monitoring site */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* City where the site is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County name where the site is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State name where the site is located */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Core Based Statistical Area name for the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last site inspection */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "parameter_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each pollutant parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_standard" TEXT /* Standard for the pollutant measurement */,
  "pollutant_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impacts of the pollutant */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impacts of the pollutant */,
  "reference_link" TEXT /* Link to additional information about the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "method_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the method */,
  "method_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the method */,
  "method_calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of method calibration */,
  "method_documentation" TEXT /* Link to the documentation of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
